raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Oyster Diaries,’ by Nancy Lemann
description: The well-born protagonist of Nancy Lemann’s novel “The Oyster Diaries” returns home and immediately feels like an outsider.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Here Where We Live Is Our Country,’ by Molly Crabapple
book_title: ‘Here Where We Live Is Our Country,’ by Molly Crabapple
description: In “Here Where We Live Is Our Country,” Molly Crabapple tells the story of a Jewish labor movement that fought antisemitism and nationalism with equal fervor.
